mapper.select:
select count(*) as total from( select dct.id, dct.type, dct.cover, dct.name, dct.className, dct.price, ifnull(dg.state,1) as state from( select d.id ,ct.goods_type as type,d.cover,d.name,ct.className,d.price from dish d join( select gc.goods_type,gc.dish_id,gc.combo_id, group_concat(mc.name separator ',') as className from goods_class gc left join menu_class mc on gc.menu_class_id = mc.id where mc.id !=0 group by gc.goods_type,gc.dish_id,gc.combo_id ) as ct on d.id = ct.dish_id where d.state = 1 ) as dct left join( select * from dept_goods where dept_id = #{id} ) dg on dct.type = dg.goods_type and dct.id = dg.goods_id union all select dct.id, dct.type, dct.cover, dct.name, dct.className, dct.price, ifnull(dg.state,1) as state from( select c.id ,ct.goods_type as type,c.cover,c.name,ct.className,c.def_price-c.reduce_price as price from combo c join( select gc.goods_type,gc.dish_id,gc.combo_id, group_concat(mc.name separator ',') as className from goods_class gc left join menu_class mc on gc.menu_class_id = mc.id where mc.id !=0 group by gc.goods_type,gc.dish_id,gc.combo_id ) as ct on c.id = ct.combo_id where c.state = 1 ) as dct left join ( select * from dept_goods where dept_id = #{id} ) dg on dct.type = dg.goods_type and dct.id = dg.goods_id ) as t
and t.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and t.className like concat('%',#{className},'%')
and t.type = #{type}
